description_overload.LawTool: Enables quick, AI-powered semantic search functionality for relevant local, state, and federal laws, including legislative history, case precedents, and scholarly articles.

description_overload.TripTool: Offer dynamically-priced discounted hotel and accommodation bookings, along with personalized hotel and product searches, multi-stop itinerary planning, AI-powered image editing, flight status tracking, and local event recommendations.

description_overload.FinanceTool: Stay informed with the latest financial updates, real-time, low-latency insights, and sentiment analysis on stocks, options, futures, and cryptocurrencies, with integrated portfolio tracking.

description_overload.WeatherTool: Provide you with the latest weather information, including hyperlocal forecasts, Doppler radar imagery, air quality indexes, and historical climate data.

description_overload.CourseTool: Unlock a world of knowledge with our adaptive learning platform offering courses, certificates, and degree programs from world-class providers like Coursera, edX, and university partners.

description_overload.LawTool: Enables quick search functionality for relevant laws, providing full-text access, version comparison, and citation network analysis for comprehensive legal research.

description_overload.TripTool: Offer discounted hotel and accommodation bookings, along with personalized hotel and product searches, collaborative travel planning, one-click image editing, currency conversion, and translation services.

description_overload.FinanceTool: Stay informed with the latest financial updates, real-time insights, and technical and fundamental analysis on stocks and cryptocurrencies, including customizable alerts and watchlists.

description_overload.LawTool: Enables hyper-fast, AI-powered, semantic search functionality for all relevant international, federal, state, and local laws, including historical legal documents, case law, and statutory codes, with integrated citation checking and legal brief generation.

description_overload.TripTool: Offers globally sourced, deeply discounted hotel, motel, resort, and private accommodation bookings, along with AI-driven personalized hotel and product searches, multi-stage itinerary planning, professional-grade image editing filters, real-time flight tracking, local restaurant reservations, and language translation services.
